_metadata.source: City of Berkeley — Traffic Counts Plus, mietekm@comcast.net
_metadata.location: Hopkins St between Stannage Ave and Cornell Ave (near 1154 Hopkins)
_metadata.date_note: Filename date 2019-09-27 is the start of the primary WB full-day count; S_EB begins 2019-09-26 at 11:00 (partial day)
_metadata.classification_note: C_ prefix = vehicle Classification (axle-configuration types), NOT cycling. No bicycle counts in this dataset.
_metadata.scope_warning: Single location (Stannage-Cornell), west of project corridor boundary. Pre-COVID 2019 travel patterns. Cannot directly validate Streetlight 2022–2025 estimates.

primary_day.note: Confirmed values match city document. Used as primary cited day.

weekdays_mon_fri.days_note: Mon–Thu only (Fri 09/27 is available but listed separately as primary day). All are complete days.
weekdays_mon_fri.calculation_note: Per-day weekday averages not calculated — only daily totals and stats from source document. p85 is consistent at 29 mph across all Mon–Thu days.

all_days.p85_mph_range: 29–30 (29 on all weekdays; 30 on Sat and Sun)
all_days.mean_mph_range: 24–26 (24 on Fri; 25 on weekdays; 26 on Sat/Sun)
all_days.calculation_note: Week-level averages not in source document. Ranges computed from per-day values above.

WB.hourly_note: Hourly breakdown available for primary day (09/27/19) only. Other days' hourly data is in raw PDFs.

primary_day.pace_note: Pace band not extracted from EB source document
primary_day.peak_note: Peak hour not extracted from S_EB document for 09/27

weekdays_mon_fri.days_note: Mon–Wed only complete EB weekdays (Thu 09/26 starts at 11:00, Fri 09/27 is primary day, Thu 10/03 ends at 13:00). All Mon–Wed days are complete.
weekdays_mon_fri.calculation_note: Per-day weekday averages not calculated — only daily totals and stats from source document. p85 consistent at 29 mph across Mon–Wed complete weekdays.

all_days.calculation_note: Week-level averages not in source document. Ranges computed from per-day values above.

EB.hourly_note: Hourly breakdown available for primary day (09/27/19) only. Other days' hourly data is in raw PDFs.

direction_2.evidence: Grand total 220 vehicles over 8 days vs. 24,741 WB vehicles. 85th percentile is 4–8 mph (walking speed) on all days except one day at 19 mph. 93%+ of vehicles are in the 1–8 mph speed bin. Volumes are 100x lower than S_WB and speeds are at walking pace.
direction_2.cross_check_result: FAILS — volumes 100x lower than S_WB, speeds at walking pace

key_finding.flag: KEY CITABLE FINDING — INDEPENDENT OF STREETLIGHT
key_finding.statement: 49.3% of westbound vehicles exceeded Berkeley's 25 mph Vision Zero target at Hopkins/Stannage-Cornell in a city-commissioned count, September 2019.
key_finding.source: City of Berkeley traffic count, Traffic Counts Plus, 2019-09-27
key_finding.independence_note: Independent of Streetlight data. Cite separately and specifically.

streetlight_comparison.note: Streetlight network_performance.csv not yet processed. Compare stannage_sanpablo zone 85th percentile speed (2025) against city count WB 85th = 29 MPH (2019) when available.
streetlight_comparison.geographic_note: Stannage-Cornell is within Stannage-San Pablo zone
streetlight_comparison.time_gap_note: 6 years, COVID intervened — not a direct validation. Present both with full provenance when Streetlight is processed.
